allow: PowerShell(cd "D:\\Claude Code\\VidaPulse\\frontend"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run","dev" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\vite-out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\vite-err.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\vite-out.txt","$env:TEMP\\vite-err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(cd "D:\\Claude Code\\VidaPulse\\frontend"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "D:\\Claude Code\\VidaPulse\\frontend"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
